name: YourThirsty
description: A full survival thirst system — HUD bar, waterskins, drinking horns, buckets, barrels, cauldron boiling, biome water quality, buffs, debuffs, and 4 difficulty modes. Drink or die.
Adds a complete thirst and water system to Valheim. Drink from natural water, fill and use containers, boil water for safety, and manage hydration. See README and CHANGELOG for details.
